notes: Clear residential overhead; z19 best balances house, yard/lot, street context. z20 is detailed but tighter.
Dense forest canopy obscures any house, driveway, or lot boundaries at all shown zooms.
Shows cul-de-sac setting with nearby houses/lots; subject location appears road-adjacent and partly obscured by trees. z19 gives best context.
Useful overhead of apparent construction/lot area with surrounding context; finished house/backyard not clearly visible. z20 has best detail.
Clear top-down view of house, driveway, street frontage, and most of lot/backyard context; z20 close but slightly cropped, z19 best overall.
Heavy tree cover and shadow obscure the house/yard; z18 shows neighborhood context but property detail is poor.
Good overhead view of home, driveway/parking, lot area, and surrounding parcels; z19 balances detail and full-lot context.
Clear view of house, yard, driveway, outbuildings/adjacent lot features, and street context; z19 is most useful.
Clear overhead view of house, yard/lot, street frontage, and surrounding parcels; z20 is closer but more cropped.
House and lot are visible with neighborhood context, though tree cover/shadows obscure some backyard detail; z20 is usable but tight.
Property and surrounding residential lots are visible; shadows and adjacent structures reduce clarity of yard boundaries. z19 gives best balance.
Imagery shows dense forest/terrain only; no identifiable house, backyard, or developed lot visible at any zoom.
House/lot area visible with surrounding roads and nearby homes, but tree canopy and shadows obscure much of the backyard/lot detail.
Clear overhead view of house, driveway, yard, and surrounding lot context; z20 also good for close detail.
Coordinate appears in dense trees near lakeshore; house/backyard not clearly visible together at any zoom.
House and lot context visible, but backyard/edges are partly obscured by trees and long shadows.
